raw.summary: BTCUSD daily chart on Coinbase showing a classic step-down / descending stair-step pattern from October 2025 through April 2026. A blue dashed diagonal resistance line runs from approximately $124,000 down to ~$80,000. There are three main consolidation zones: (1) a large sideways box from Jul–Oct 2025 roughly $108k–$124k with a mid-line near $116k; (2) a tighter ascending channel Dec 2025–Jan 2026 between ~$84k–$97k; and (3) the current ascending channel Feb–Apr 2026 between ~$60k–$76k. After each consolidation, price has dropped sharply to the next lower zone. The overall structure is bearish with the diagonal resistance capping rallies and price making lower consolidation zones over time.
